name: Jim Bowie's Hush Puppies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients with just enough milk to make a thick mixture.
2. Wet hands and roll the mixture into 1 1/2 inch balls.
3. Drop the balls into deep fat and fry until brown.
4. Remove from the oil when cooked through and drain on absorbent paper.
5. Salt and pepper can be added to taste in place of Cajun seasoning.
